hero.title: Become job-ready across Python, SQL, Web and Java.
hero.subtitle: Interactive lessons, browser coding, real-world missions, AI mentoring, team projects and evidence-backed portfolios — in one learning platform.

academyCards.title: Python Academy
academyCards.tagline: Automation, data, APIs and production engineering

academyCards.title: SQL & Database Academy
academyCards.tagline: Querying, modelling, performance and data quality

academyCards.title: Web Development Academy
academyCards.tagline: HTML, CSS, JavaScript and frontend delivery

academyCards.title: Java Academy
academyCards.tagline: Core Java, OOP, backend and Spring

journey.title: Choose your academy
journey.body: Start with one skill or build a cross-academy path.

journey.title: Learn actively
journey.body: Read, predict, code, debug and explain.

journey.title: Build evidence
journey.body: Complete projects, assessments, missions and team work.

journey.title: Prove readiness
journey.body: Export portfolios, credentials and evidence dossiers.

faq.q: Do I need to install anything?
faq.a: No. Core learning and supported coding experiences run in the browser.

faq.q: Can I use more than one academy?
faq.a: Yes. One developer profile combines progress and evidence across all academies.

faq.q: Does the AI mentor reveal answers?
faq.a: It is designed to ask questions and give graduated hints before revealing solutions.
Yes. CodeQuest includes cohorts, assignments, gradebooks, reviews and analytics.
Private learning data is not made public by default. Portfolio exports are created only when requested.
